posts.heading: Posts ({count})
posts.empty: No posts yet. Click "New post" to write your first.

categories.heading: Categories ({count})
categories.empty: No categories yet. Create one to organize blog posts.
categories.delete_confirm_with_posts_one: Delete the category "{name}"?\n\nThere is 1 post in this category. It will keep its content but lose the category assignment.
categories.delete_confirm_with_posts_many: Delete the category "{name}"?\n\nThere are {count} posts in this category. They will keep their content but lose the category assignment.

edit_category.description_placeholder: Short description shown on hover and in the category hero.
edit_category.icon_help: e.g. fas fa-newspaper, far fa-comments, fab fa-github
edit_category.newsletter_label: Send newsletter when a post is published in this category
edit_category.newsletter_help: Every subscriber will be emailed automatically when a post is first published here. Make sure your SMTP and sending domain are configured before turning this on.

subscribers.heading: Newsletter subscribers
subscribers.blurb: Users who have subscribed to your newsletter from the blog sidebar. Download the list as CSV to broadcast from any mail tool, or enable "Send newsletter when published" on a category to auto-send via Flarum's SMTP whenever a post in that category goes live.

settings.title_help: Shown in the hero header when using a text-mode header. Leave blank to fall back to the forum title.
settings.tagline_help: Short description shown under the hero title.
settings.header_mode_help: Choose how the blog name appears in the hero. Logo mode uses the logo from Flarum → Appearance → Basics.
settings.header_mode_none: None (image only — hides title, logo, and tagline)
settings.hero_bg_help: Add a background behind the hero. A darkening overlay keeps the text readable.
settings.hero_bg_image_help_with_upload: Used when "Background image" is selected above. Recommend at least 2000px wide. Upload or paste a URL.
settings.hero_bg_image_help_no_upload: Used when "Background image" is selected above. Recommend at least 2000px wide. Install fof/upload to get a direct upload button.
settings.hero_overlay_help: How much to darken the background so the title is readable. 0 = no darkening, 90 = nearly black.
settings.nav_label_help: Label for the "back to forum" link in the blog top navigation. Leave blank for "Forum".
settings.nav_icon_help: FontAwesome class for the forum link icon (e.g. fas fa-home, fas fa-comments).
settings.posts_per_page_help: Number of posts shown on the blog index before "Load more".
settings.members_teaser_help: How many characters of a members-only post to show non-members before the login wall.
settings.about_title_help: Optional heading shown above the widget in the sidebar. Leave blank to skip the title.
settings.about_html_help: Raw HTML shown in the sidebar on every blog page. Use it for an about blurb, a newsletter signup, social links, or anything else. Leave blank to hide the widget. Anything valid in HTML is fine here — your input is rendered as-is, so only admins should have access to this setting.
settings.upload_no_url: Upload succeeded but no URL returned.
settings.upload_endpoint_missing: Upload endpoint not found. Is fof/upload installed and enabled?

admin.placeholder: Link Robins Blog is installed. Manage posts, categories, subscribers, and settings from the tabs above.

sidebar.drafts_tooltip: Posts you have saved as drafts

subscribe.subscribed_tooltip: Subscribed to the newsletter. Click to unsubscribe.
subscribe.sign_in_tooltip: Sign in to subscribe to the newsletter.
subscribe.subscribe_failed: Could not subscribe. Please try again.
subscribe.unsubscribe_failed: Could not unsubscribe. Please try again.

index.hero_drafts_tagline: Unpublished posts you can edit or publish from here.
index.empty_drafts: No drafts yet. New posts you save as drafts will appear here.
index.load_failed: Something went wrong loading the blog.
index.render_failed: Something went wrong rendering the blog. Try refreshing the page.

post.render_failed: Something went wrong rendering this post. Try refreshing the page.
post.members_only_text_guest: Log in or sign up to keep reading.
post.members_only_text_member: Your account doesn't have access to this post.
post.comments_locked: Comments are closed for this post.
post.comments_guest_prompt: Sign in to leave a comment.
post.delete_confirm: Delete this post? This cannot be undone.
post.log_in_or_sign_up: Log in or sign up to keep reading.

edit_post.slug_help: Auto-generated from title if left blank.
edit_post.excerpt_help: Short summary shown in listings and emails. Leave blank to auto-generate from content.
edit_post.excerpt_placeholder: Optional summary for cards. If empty, the first paragraph of the body is used.
edit_post.cover_url_help: Paste a URL above. Install fof/upload to get a direct upload button.
edit_post.cover_credit_help: Shown as a small caption under the cover image.
edit_post.cover_credit_placeholder: Photo by Jane Doe on Unsplash
edit_post.cover_credit_url_help: Optional. If set, the credit text above becomes a link to this URL (opens in a new tab). Only http(s) URLs are accepted.
edit_post.body_placeholder: Write in markdown. **bold**, *italic*, [links](https://...), and so on.
edit_post.discard_confirm: You have unsaved changes to this post. Discard them?
edit_post.title_body_required: Please add a title and some content before saving.
edit_post.upload_no_url: Upload succeeded but no URL was returned.
edit_post.upload_endpoint_missing: Upload endpoint not found. Is the fof/upload extension installed and enabled?
edit_post.upload_endpoint_missing_short: Upload endpoint not found. Is fof/upload installed and enabled?
